one_time_description: Previous legal claim of approximately $1,175,000 written off as income after management determined claims were prescribed and plaintiff lost right to them
economic_notes: COVID-19 significant event noted; ISC provided funding support for COVID-19 activities. Daycare (Tsi Rontswa'takhwa) operates under PFI program with National Bank of Canada mortgage. Land claim negotiation ongoing re: Seigneury of the Lake of Two Mountains with $1,028,515 ISC interim loan outstanding.
notes: Audit is qualified due to missing capital asset records from 2002-2006 and expensing of capital asset purchases 2007-2008. One-time recovery of $1,176,284 from prescribed legal claims boosted surplus significantly. ISC loan of $1,028,515 for land claim negotiations due March 31, 2021 or on settlement. PFI mortgage for daycare building secured by Quebec government grant receivable of $917,881. COVID-19 significant event disclosed. Total government transfers figure not fully calculable as the provincial transfers note was truncated in source text; isc_funding shown as net of deferrals per Note 17. expenses_education combines Education ($4,111,691) and FNEC ($622,869). No remuneration schedule provided in extracted text.
